Notes: Attempt to delete the zone apex name with delete_name. RFC 2181 requires SOA and NS at the origin; the resulting update handling and post-state are underspecified by RFC 2136.

Steps.Description: Delete the apex name campus.edu. using delete_name, with no prerequisites.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the apex SOA remains present after the UPDATE.

Steps.Name: campus.edu.
Steps.Description: Observe whether the apex NS remains present after the UPDATE.
